caribbean.name: Caribbean
caribbean.description: Classic tropical diving with vibrant reefs and wrecks

anguilla.name: Anguilla
anguilla.bestTime: December to March is driest, though the warm 27°C waters make it diveable year-round.

aruba.name: Aruba
aruba.description: Wrecks, reefs, and year-round warm water.
aruba.bestTime: March to June brings the driest months, with water temperatures pleasantly warm at 26°C.

bahamas.name: Bahamas
bahamas.description: Crystal clear waters, blue holes, and shark encounters.
bahamas.bestTime: May to September, the seas calm, with temperatures warming to 30°C. For visibility and weather, consider diving November to May.

barbados.name: Barbados
barbados.description: Wrecks, turtles, and easy shore diving.
barbados.bestTime: September and November feature the calmest seas and clearest water, with warm temperatures at 29–30°C.

bonaire.name: Bonaire
bonaire.description: Shore diving capital, marine park, and easy access reefs.
bonaire.bestTime: February to May remains the driest, with temperatures from a warm 27°C to 30°C.

bvi.name: British Virgin Islands
bvi.description: Wreck of the Rhone, coral gardens, and calm anchorages.

cayman-islands.name: Cayman Islands
cayman-islands.description: World-class wall diving, Stingray City, and clear Caribbean waters.
cayman-islands.bestTime: April offers the calmest seas and driest conditions, with warm temperatures of 27–31°C, although December to May also presents good conditions for diving.

cuba.name: Cuba
cuba.description: Jardines de la Reina, wrecks, and healthy reefs.
cuba.bestTime: The Caribbean coast of Cuba dries out from January to April, perfect for dives in 27–31°C waters. The Gulf of Mexico calms from June to September. On the Pacific coast, May to September brings settled seas and warm waters around 26–30°C.

ciego-de-vila-province.name: Ciego de Ávila Province
ciego-de-vila-province.description: Diving in Ciego de Ávila Province.

isla-de-la-juventud.name: Isla de la Juventud
isla-de-la-juventud.description: Diving in Isla de la Juventud.

isla-de-la-juventud-special-municipality.name: Isla de la Juventud Special Municipality
isla-de-la-juventud-special-municipality.description: Diving in Isla de la Juventud Special Municipality.

pinar-del-ro-province.name: Pinar del Río Province
pinar-del-ro-province.description: Diving in Pinar del Río Province.

curacao.name: Curaçao
curacao.description: Colorful reefs, wrecks, and vibrant marine life.
curacao.bestTime: February to May offers Curaçao's driest months, with water temperatures at a mild 27°C, perfect for uninterrupted diving.

dominica.name: Dominica
dominica.description: The Nature Island, famous for volcanic pinnacles, healthy reefs, and whale watching.
dominica.bestTime: April sees Dominica with calmest seas and dry skies, alongside warm 27°C waters. Look also to November–May for favorable conditions.

dominican-republic.name: Dominican Republic
dominican-republic.description: Caribbean island nation with vibrant reefs, wrecks, and whale watching.
dominican-republic.bestTime: January to March plus June provide the Dominican Republic's driest months, with water holding steady at a mild 27°C.

grenada.name: Grenada
grenada.description: Wreck diving capital of the Caribbean, including the Bianca C.
grenada.bestTime: Grenada's calmest seas extend from July to November, with warm water temperatures between 27–30°C, creating a welcoming environment for divers.

carriacou-and-petite-martinique.name: Carriacou and Petite Martinique
carriacou-and-petite-martinique.description: Diving in Carriacou and Petite Martinique.

honduras.name: Honduras
honduras.description: Home to the Bay Islands, whale sharks, and vibrant reefs in the Caribbean Sea.
honduras.bestTime: In May, seas calm and rains ease, aligning with March–September's favorable conditions, in waters at a mild 27°C.

islas-de-la-baha.name: Islas de la Bahía
islas-de-la-baha.description: Diving in Islas de la Bahía.

islas-de-la-bahia.name: Islas de la Bahia
islas-de-la-bahia.description: Diving in Islas de la Bahia.

jamaica.name: Jamaica
jamaica.description: Laid-back diving, reefs, and wrecks in warm waters.
jamaica.bestTime: April to May and August to October calm Jamaica's seas, with waters warming between 27–30°C. However, December to April can offer some of the most favorable conditions.

montserrat.name: Montserrat
montserrat.bestTime: January to March offers the driest months for diving, with water temperatures around 27°C. June also provides a dry window, with waters warming to 29–30°C.

nicaragua.name: Nicaragua
nicaragua.description: Caribbean and Pacific coasts, Corn Islands, and volcanic lakes with unique diving.
nicaragua.bestTime: April provides the clearest water and driest conditions, with the sea at a mild 26°C. Optimal conditions also stretch from December to April.

south-atlantic-autonomous-region.name: South Atlantic Autonomous Region
south-atlantic-autonomous-region.description: Diving in South Atlantic Autonomous Region.

south-caribbean-coast-autonomous-region.name: South Caribbean Coast Autonomous Region
south-caribbean-coast-autonomous-region.description: Diving in South Caribbean Coast Autonomous Region.

saint-kitts-nevis.name: Saint Kitts and Nevis
saint-kitts-nevis.description: Wrecks, reefs, and volcanic islands in a twin-island nation.
saint-kitts-nevis.bestTime: In Saint Kitts and Nevis, dive between December and March to enjoy the driest months, accompanied by comfortable water temperatures around 27°C.

saint-lucia.name: Saint Lucia
saint-lucia.bestTime: April to May brings the calmest seas and the driest months, with water warm at 27°C.

anse-la-raye-quarter.name: Anse la Raye Quarter
anse-la-raye-quarter.description: Diving in Anse la Raye Quarter.

st-vincent-grenadines.name: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines
st-vincent-grenadines.description: Critter diving, reefs, and volcanic islands.
st-vincent-grenadines.bestTime: November offers the calmest seas and clearest water in Saint Vincent and the Grenadines, with warm sea temperatures from 27–30°C.

trinidad-tobago.name: Trinidad and Tobago
trinidad-tobago.description: Diverse diving from vibrant reefs to drift dives, with both Caribbean and Atlantic influences.

turks-caicos.name: Turks and Caicos Islands
turks-caicos.description: Wall diving, humpback whales, and pristine reefs.
turks-caicos.bestTime: January–April for humpbacks; December–May for diving.
turks-caicos.bestTimeAuto: Diving conditions are driest from February to April and in June, with water temperatures from 26°C to 30°C. Humpbacks appear January to April, and December to May features excellent diving.

guadeloupe.name: Guadeloupe
guadeloupe.description: Cousteau Reserve, reefs, and French-Caribbean culture.
guadeloupe.bestTime: January to April brings the driest months, with water temperatures at a pleasant 27°C, perfect for diving.

martinique.name: Martinique
martinique.bestTime: January to April sees the driest months, with waters maintaining a warm 27–30°C.

bermuda.name: Bermuda
bermuda.description: Famous for shipwrecks, pink sand beaches, and clear blue water. Technically in the North Atlantic, but often grouped with the Caribbean for diving.
bermuda.bestTime: May to August, seas calm and temperatures climb to a warm 29°C. Consider May to October for consistently warm water.

puerto-rico.name: Puerto Rico
puerto-rico.bestTime: In April and May, experience the clearest waters and calmest conditions, with temperatures at a warm 27–30°C.

colombia.name: Colombia
colombia.description: Diving in both the Caribbean and Pacific, with vibrant reefs, islands, and marine life.
colombia.bestTime: Colombia's Caribbean coast stays diveable year-round, with the calmest seas from May and August to November, in warm 28–30°C waters. The Pacific coast offers clearer water from August to November, with temperatures of 27–29°C.

archipielago-de-san-andres-providencia-y.name: Archipielago de San Andres, Providencia y Santa Catalina
archipielago-de-san-andres-providencia-y.description: Diving in Archipielago de San Andres, Providencia y Santa Catalina.

san-andrs-y-providencia.name: San Andrés y Providencia
san-andrs-y-providencia.description: Diving in San Andrés y Providencia.

el-salvador.name: El Salvador
el-salvador.description: Pacific coast diving with volcanic rock reefs and unique marine life.
el-salvador.bestTime: February to March provides the calmest seas and clearest waters, with warm temperatures of 29–31°C. The period from November to April is noted for optimal diving conditions.

usvi.name: U.S. Virgin Islands
usvi.description: Wrecks, reefs, and easy island hopping.
usvi.bestTime: December to March are the driest months in the U.S. Virgin Islands, with consistently warm waters at 27°C.

st-martin.name: St. Martin / Sint Maarten
st-martin.description: Wrecks, reefs, and a blend of French and Dutch culture.
st-martin.bestTime: St. Martin / Sint Maarten sees its driest months from December to March, with sea temperatures a warm 27–30°C.

st-lucia.name: St. Lucia
st-lucia.description: Pitons, wall dives, and healthy reefs.
st-lucia.bestTime: April delivers the calmest seas and driest months in St. Lucia, with pleasantly warm waters of 27–30°C.

antigua-barbuda.name: Antigua & Barbuda
antigua-barbuda.bestTime: January to March features the clearest water and driest months, with a warm 27°C ocean.

st-vincent-and-the-grenadines.name: St. Vincent And The Grenadines
st-vincent-and-the-grenadines.description: Diving in St. Vincent And The Grenadines.
st-vincent-and-the-grenadines.bestTime: From July to November, the seas lie calmest. The water is warmest at 29–30°C, easing to around 27°C at its coolest.

st-kitts-and-nevis.name: St. Kitts And Nevis
st-kitts-and-nevis.description: Diving in St. Kitts And Nevis.
st-kitts-and-nevis.bestTime: December to March provides the driest months and a cooler 27°C water temperature.

british-virgin-islands.name: British Virgin Islands
british-virgin-islands.bestTime: From December to March, the islands experience their driest months, with temperatures around 27°C, making it the ideal time for diving.

sint-maarten.name: Sint Maarten
sint-maarten.bestTime: December to March is the driest period in Sint Maarten, with water temperatures settling at a mild 27–28°C. Plan your dives for these months to enjoy drier weather.

trinidad-and-tobago.name: Trinidad And Tobago
trinidad-and-tobago.bestTime: July to October sees the calmest seas, with water temperatures rising to a warm 29–30°C.

san-pedro-de-macoris.name: San Pedro De Macoris
san-pedro-de-macoris.description: Diving in San Pedro De Macoris.

jardines-de-la-reina.name: Jardines De La Reina
jardines-de-la-reina.description: Diving in Jardines De La Reina.

little-san-salvador-island.name: Little San Salvador Island
little-san-salvador-island.description: Diving in Little San Salvador Island.

san-andrs-and-providencia.name: San Andrés And Providencia
san-andrs-and-providencia.description: Diving in San Andrés And Providencia.
